response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled individual contributor with broad full-stack experience and some recent, tangential exposure to agentic AI tooling, but falls significantly short of the CTO profile. There is no evidence of executive, director, or even engineering-management experience; no team-scaling track record; and his AI work (MCP code generators, workflow tooling) is tooling-adjacent rather than owning production multi-agent systems with real financial consequences. Fintech exposure at RIDE Capital and Optilyz was contributor-level without credit infrastructure, payment flows, or regulatory compliance ownership. The current title of Staff Software Engineer places him at least three career levels below this role.
strengths: Deep polyglot, distributed-systems background with demonstrated high-throughput scale at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency async I/O).
Active contribution to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing directional alignment with the role's technical focus.
Long-running architectural ownership of an event-driven, open-source GIS platform (GISCollective) demonstrating multi-year system stewardship.
concerns: Zero evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational scaling — a hard blocker for a role requiring scale from 10 to 30+ engineers.
AI experience is shallow and recent: limited to framework/tooling contribution rather than designing, operating, or evaluating production multi-agent systems at financial scale.
Fintech depth is insufficient: no credit systems, payment infrastructure, embedded finance, or multi-jurisdictional regulatory compliance work is present anywhere in the history.

key_factors.factor: No executive or people-leadership track record
